ground_truth.title: Best all-inclusive vacation deal | Club Med
ground_truth.main_content: Caribbean & Mexico Sale 40% OFF. Up to $300 pp/week Instant Savings. Up to $300 Instant Air Credit. Kids under 4 stay FREE. No Single Supplement. Travel until June 19, 2026. Find your dream destination with Club Med's all-inclusive vacation deals across Caribbean, Mexico, Canada, Alps, Asia, Indian Ocean, Brazil, and Europe. Book with peace of mind - Best Rate Guarantee, Low Deposits & Flexible Payments, Flexible Cancellations, and Serenity Insurance available. Your Club Med booking includes luxurious accommodations, gourmet dining experiences with unlimited world-class dining and premium beverages, wide range of activities including land sports, water sports, and entertainment, plus family-friendly features with Kids' Clubs from 4 months to 17 years old.
with: Caribbean & Mexico Sale 40% OFF with up to $300 pp/week Instant Savings
Kids under 4 stay FREE with no single supplement on all-inclusive vacations
Club Med offers Best Rate Guarantee with flexible cancellation policies
All-inclusive booking includes gourmet dining, premium beverages, and unlimited activities
Kids' Clubs available from 4 months to 17 years for family-friendly vacations
